subject: Codebase-wide Neon reference cleanup — Neon is deprecated
description: sales-coworker detected stale Neon references during bootstrap. Neon is no longer in the infrastructure stack. Grep the entire codebase for 'neon' / 'Neon' references in: vendor/, seeds/, cowork/, src/, docs/, CLAUDE.md. Remove or replace with current database provider. Original signal: sales-agent mailbox had a Neon cost-tracking task from product-management-agent.

pass_if: no stale neon references in active code
fail_if: active code still references neon as current provider

error.evidence: sales-agent mailbox contained Neon cost task; Neon is deprecated
error.fix: Grep codebase for neon references, remove or update

subject: issue #522: make Ollama POST inference reachable over Tailscale + durable across wsl --shutdown

payload.outcome: POST /api/chat over the WSL Tailscale IP returns HTTP 200 + non-empty message.content, and survives `wsl --shutdown`.
payload.root_cause_hypothesis: Ollama bound to 127.0.0.1 only; userspace forwarder relays GET (no body) but drops POST request bodies, so /api/chat dies at the ~5s read-timeout (http_code=000).
payload.canonical_fix: set OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0:11434 via systemd override, then daemon-reload + restart ollama — removes the forwarder entirely. @cite https://docs.ollama.com/faq

steps_required.action: DIAGNOSTIC — isolate forwarder vs Ollama. Run the inference test against loopback ON the WSL box (no forwarder, no Tailscale).
steps_required.interpret: PASS => Ollama+model are healthy, the network path is the only fault => proceed to step 2. FAIL => problem is Ollama/model itself (do NOT apply the systemd fix blindly; report the failure).

steps_required.action: FIX — apply the canonical systemd override (one-time, requires sudo).
steps_required.cmd: sudo mkdir -p /etc/systemd/system/ollama.service.d && grep -q 'OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0' /etc/systemd/system/ollama.service.d/override.conf 2>/dev/null || printf '[Service]\nEnvironment="OLLAMA_HOST=0.0.0.0:11434"\n' | sudo tee -a /etc/systemd/system/ollama.service.d/override.conf && sudo systemctl daemon-reload && sudo systemctl restart ollama

steps_required.action: VERIFY bind — confirm Ollama now listens on 0.0.0.0, not 127.0.0.1.
VERIFY inference over Tailscale from the WSL box itself.

payload.defer_protocol: macos agent will not SSH/sudo into WSL (publickey denied + operator constraint). The handoff IS the contract. macos confirms PASS only after step4 result lands.

subject: issue #522: WSL operator sudo needed — make Ollama bind durable (0.0.0.0 + origins)

payload.reason: bind/persistent-override require sudo on WSL; no agent can type the password (failure row #7)
payload.resolution: operator ran `sudo durable-ollama harden`; bind=0.0.0.0; hostname POST 200 verified from macOS

subject: Deploy cowork-frontend Worker — serve 2026-06-19 morning summary at /summary

payload.reason: src/worker.ts edited to add /summary + /morning-summary routes and a footer link serving MORNING_SUMMARY_HTML (2026-06-19). Prod deploy needs CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, unavailable in the scheduled (no-HITL) run.
payload.verify: curl -s https://cowork.subagentknowledge.com/summary | grep -q 'morning summary' && curl -s https://cowork.subagentknowledge.com/ | grep -q '/summary'
payload.note: esbuild bundles src/worker.ts (NOT index.js). worker.ts transpiles clean (0 tsc diagnostics). Future: automate refresh of MORNING_SUMMARY_HTML in the 07:00 PST job instead of hand-inlining.
